lessons.title: Sampling Without Replacement
lessons.content:
## Sampling Without Replacement

When items are not returned after selection.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Hypergeometric PMF
lessons.content:
## Hypergeometric PMF

h(x;N,n,k) = C(K,x)C(N-K,n-x)/C(N,n).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Mean and Variance
lessons.content:
## Mean and Variance

μ = nK/N, σ² = n(K/N)(1-K/N)(N-n)/(N-1).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Relation to Binomial
lessons.content:
## Relation to Binomial

Binomial approximates hypergeometric when n/N ≤ 0.05.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Applications
lessons.content:
